summary: Phase 2D: Adds emission_id UUID column + partial unique index to lcs.cid_intake (one emission → one CID). Updates fn_promote_emission for idempotency: already-PROMOTED emissions return clean, pre-check for existing CID before INSERT prevents double-minting, conflict path resolves existing CID and marks PROMOTED. No RAISE on any path. Batch wrapper unchanged (already uses FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED + return-state logic). 9 enforcement tests across 5 categories.

indexes_added: uq_cid_intake_emission_id (partial unique WHERE emission_id IS NOT NULL)

idempotency_paths: Already PROMOTED + promoted_cid set → RETURN clean
CID already exists in cid_intake for emission_id → resolve existing CID, mark PROMOTED, RETURN clean
payload.correctness: No RAISE after state mutation (preserved from SRC 3 patch). Batch wrapper unchanged.
